common.apiUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Make sure the API is running (npm run dev:all).

footer.trustSummary: TrocSpot helps you browse the catalogue and chat with the shop in-app. Payment, pickup, and warranty details are agreed directly with the seller — use the same care as any peer-to-peer deal.

messaging.title: In-app messaging
messaging.desc: Discuss your order inside the app without posting your email on listings.

safety.title: Reporting
safety.desc: You can report inappropriate listings; reported content may be reviewed by the team.

legal.title: Legal & data
legal.desc: Access legal notices and the privacy policy to understand how data is handled.

home.heroSubtitle: Clothing, books, gear — pick an item and contact the shop to prepare your order.
home.emptyCatalog: The catalogue is published by the administrator. Check back soon or browse categories.
home.devHint: Tip: to load sample listings with images (public/sample-listings/), run npm run seed in server (demo account demo@trocspot.local / demo12345), then refresh.
home.recentLoadError: Recent listings could not be loaded.

auth.subtitle: Browse the catalogue and contact the shop for your order

listings.intro: Browse offers or refine with the filters below.
listings.emptyDescFiltered: Try broadening your search or reset the filters.
listings.emptyDescDefault: The catalogue is managed by the administrator. Locally, load demo data or sign in as admin to publish.
listings.devHint: Development: to fill the list with sample images, run npm run seed in the server folder, then refresh.
listings.loadError: Could not load listings. Make sure the API is running.

listingDetail.reportDesc: Describe the issue (10 to 500 characters). Reports are reviewed by moderation.
listingDetail.toastRequestDesc: A message was sent to the shop. You can add details in the conversation.
listingDetail.soldHint: This listing is marked as sold and no longer accepts new requests.

messages.loginPrompt: Sign in to see your messages.
messages.emptyAdmin: No conversations yet. They appear when a visitor contacts the shop or a listing.
messages.emptyUser: No conversations yet. Use “Message the shop” or “Request this product” on a listing.
messages.selectUser: Select a conversation or message the shop.
messages.openOkDesc: You can write to the shop below.
messages.sendFailDesc: Your message could not be sent. Please try again.

seller.notFound: This seller does not exist or has no public profile.

favorites.intro: Listings you saved. Tap the heart again to remove one from this list.
favorites.emptyDesc: Browse listings and tap the heart to save them here.

account.title: My account
account.dangerDesc: Deleting your account is permanent (listings, messages, profile).
account.deleteConfirmDesc: This cannot be undone. All related data will be removed.
account.prefsInAppDesc: Get a notification when a new message arrives (bell in the top bar).
account.prefsThemeHint: Light / dark theme is set in the navigation bar (sun / moon icon).

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.disclaimer: Message notifications are created when a message arrives. The list refreshes automatically (about every 12 seconds). This is not instant real-time messaging.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page does not exist or has been moved.

legal.notice: The legal texts below are in French. An English version may be added later.
